mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT stock_code, stock_name FROM daily_stock_change
GROUP BY stock_code, stock_name ) summary_count

SELECT stock_code AS stockCode, stock_name AS stockName, MIN(trade_date) AS firstTradeDate, MAX(trade_date) AS latestTradeDate, COUNT(*) AS changeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN change_type = '增持' THEN ABS(total_price) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncrease, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN change_type = '减持' THEN ABS(total_price) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalDecrease, COALESCE(SUM(ABS(total_price)), 0) AS totalAmount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT NULLIF(changer_name, '') ORDER BY changer_name SEPARATOR ',') AS changerName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT NULLIF(changer_position, '') ORDER BY changer_position SEPARATOR ',') AS changerPosition FROM daily_stock_change
GROUP BY stock_code, stock_name
ORDER BY totalAmount ASC, latestTradeDate DESC, stockCode ASC
ORDER BY totalAmount DESC, latestTradeDate DESC, stockCode ASC
ORDER BY latestTradeDate DESC, totalAmount DESC, stockCode ASC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
